ab: watan mungi saku maras inpit la baqun su ksyuw inpit cikay ma?
ch: W:Watan，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: watan, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: ungat rwa maku uzi la qutux ga rwa Lawa hiya qani.
en: I don’t have one either. This is Lawa’s.

ab: yasa qu ksyugay maku cikay ma? helaw ku pbbiq isu lozi.
ch: W:那可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.

ab: agu, agan.
en: Sure, take it.

ab: mhuway su, biqiy hnway maku Lawa uzi.
en: Thank you and thank lawa for me.

ab: kya nanu szyon su na?
en: May I help you?

ab: bzihiy saku miq sazing biru qani.
en: I want to return these two books.

ab: kya nanu szyon su na?
en: No problem and what else do you need?

ab: ksyugun mu cyugan bbiru qani lozi.
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: aw la. laxi zngi wahiy sbzih miq babaw cyugan ryax lozi.
ch: A:好了。記得三天後要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.

ab: ini saku bzihan miq ssom na ki.
en: You haven’t returned me the eraser.

ab: wal maku bzihan miq hera la.
en: I returned it yesterday.

ab: yasa ga swa ini ’luy ssom mu la.
ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了。
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: isu ga ini su wan ksyugan Watan la.
en: Did you lend it to watan?

ab: ini maku baqiy ’say mu maqut hiya.
en: I don’t know. I will go and ask her.

ab: ksyugay misu ssom maku ha.
en: I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: Sayun, lukusoba’ qani ga kinsyugan su nya Watan ga?
en: Sayun, did watan lend you this coat?

ab: iyat qani bnaziy ni yaya mu.
ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: lukusoba’ na Watan ga mtnaq rwa su.
en: watan’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: lukusoba’ nya ga mqalux, ini ptnaq qu ptasan ta.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: Sayun su ksyugun pila Watan pi?
en: Sayun, did you borrow money from watan?

ab: agu, aki maku sbiq pila kinsyugan soni, mungi saku maras pila la.
ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: yasa ga knwan qu sbiq su?
en: Then, when will you return the money?

ab: suxan ga sbiq maku pila kinsyugan maku hiya.
en: I will return to him tomorrow.

ab: aw, pragay misu kmayan Watan.
en: Okay, I will tell watan for you.
